name: Stickman Hit 3D
description: Welcome! Are you ready to embark on an unforgettable journey in this incredibly exciting 3D platform game? The story takes place in a fantastical world. Your character is a brave and fearless hero! He is trying to save the world from evil forces! Dive into this thrilling adventure from beginning to end! Throughout the game, you can collect bonuses and extra features. These items provide you with much more powerful weapons and energy! If you enjoyed the game, please rate it!
instructions: W A S D and Mouse
